questionHtml: Outline why an alloy is usually harder than its components by referring to its structure.
markschemeHtml:
difference in ionic/atomic radius prevents layers sliding over each other

Accept “difference in diameter/packing of cations prevents layers sliding over each other”.

meta.title: Outline why an alloy is usually harder than its components by referring to its structure.
